social:piasnews-social-1e7cb0c043289151:.source_text: Q: How do you leave this weekend from a performance perspective? "I mean we weren't great, obviously. But we knew that from pretty early on. I think being such a step behind was a little bit of a surprise for us but in some ways also not. I think we expected Ferrari to be quick in Austria and they weren't. And here wasn't a huge surprise that they were quick. The fact that they were able to go and win the race, was a bit surprising. But we felt they were definitely a step ahead of us so that's where we are."
social:piasnews-social-1e7cb0c043289151:.zh: 问：从比赛表现来看，如何评价这个周末的表现呢？“显然，我们的表现并不理想。不过，我们很早就意识到了这一点。虽然落后这么多确实让我们有些意外，但某种程度上也并不意外。我们本来就预计法拉利在奥地利会表现得很快，但实际上他们并没有做到。而他们能赢得比赛，倒真是有点出乎意料。不过，我们觉得法拉利确实比我们强一些，事实就是如此。”

social:piasnews-social-bc3195ceb471eb0e:.source_text: Q: What is a realistic target? "I think trying to beat the redbulls is probably the main opportunity. Maybe we can beat the ferraris...but I'm not particularly optimistic. We'll see what we get. I mean, the first few laps of the sprint this morning were chaos so hopefully we can get amongst it and hang on from there."
social:piasnews-social-bc3195ceb471eb0e:.zh: 问：什么是现实的目标呢？“我觉得，试图击败红牛队应该是我们的主要目标。也许我们还有机会战胜法拉利队……不过我并不太乐观。让我们拭目以待吧。今天早上的冲刺阶段情况很混乱，希望我们能设法融入竞争并坚持下去。”

social:piasnews-social-14a17b738b72a4b0:.source_text: Q: On your side of the garage was there some head scratching? "Uh, there was a lot of it. Just struggled a lot with rear grip. We thought we made some pretty sensible changes into qualifying but they just didn't really have the impact we were hoping for I guess. A bit of a surprise as to why it's been so tricky the whole weekend. We've been battling with the balance of the car the whole weekend which normally we feel like lack grip and downforce. This weekend it's been a pretty big handful to drive the car. Hopefully we can see what we can do tomorrow and make it a little bit nicer."
social:piasnews-social-14a17b738b72a4b0:.zh: 问：在车库里，你们那边有没有遇到什么令人头疼的问题呢？“嗯，确实有很多问题。后轮的抓地力一直很差。我们在排位赛中尝试了一些调整，但似乎并没有达到预期的效果。整个周末都面临着各种难题。通常情况下，我们会觉得是汽车的抓地力和下压力不足，但这个周末的情况则完全不同。希望明天能找到解决办法，让情况有所改善。”

social:piasnews-social-b4415e42c168a520:.source_text: whoops I wrote the "few things" sentence twice sorry 😭😭
social:piasnews-social-b4415e42c168a520:.zh: 哎呀，我把“几件事”这句话写了两次，实在不好意思😭😭

social:piasnews-social-69a831ffb2073929:.source_text: Q: Can I ask what you positively found from the start? "I mean our starts all year have been strong. So I think for us that's- I was surprised it was so good but I think that's definitely the positive. Everything else we need to improve a little bit and hopefully we can do that for this afternoon."
social:piasnews-social-69a831ffb2073929:.zh: 问：请问从一开始您就觉得哪些方面是不错的呢？“我的意思是，我们全年的开局都相当不错。所以，我觉得这确实是个积极的方面。当然，还有其他一些方面需要进一步改进，希望我们能在今天下午的比赛中做到这一点。”

social:piasnews-social-1b004cfebb172d7d:.source_text: Q: Bit hard to follow that race! "Yeah, it was pretty chaotic that's for sure! I mean it was very hard to work out what was going on in the car. Trying to avoid crashing into the back of people most of the time so pretty chaotic. I think a few things there's a few things we can do better for sure but we also want to improve the car a bit. We're struggling a little bit. I think the pace looked okay then, just very difficult to get that out of the car."
social:piasnews-social-1b004cfebb172d7d:.zh: 问：那场比赛实在很难理解其进程！“没错，场面确实一片混乱！根本很难弄清楚每辆车的具体情况。大部分时间都得努力避免撞到后面的车，所以整个比赛过程都很混乱。我觉得有一些地方我们还可以做得更好，同时也需要对赛车进行一些改进。我们目前面临一些困难。不过，我觉得赛车的整体表现还算不错，只是很难把赛车的性能完全发挥出来而已。”

social:piasnews-social-6b77aa62e282f715:.source_text: Q: Did the car feel better from practice to SQ? "Yeah...it improved a bit definitely but not as much as we need unfortunately. I felt like I've really been on it today and we've just not had the pace so um bit of a shame. We'll try again tomorrow!" https://t.co/Tdy7ozSqty
social:piasnews-social-6b77aa62e282f715:.zh: 问：从练习赛到正式比赛，这辆车的表现有提升吗？“嗯……确实有所改善，但遗憾的是，改善幅度还不足以满足我们的需求。今天我尽力了，只是我们的速度还不够快，真是有点可惜。明天我们会再试一次！”https://t.co/Tdy7ozSqty

social:piasnews-social-a749b8efd05c6de7:.source_text: Q: Is that kind of where you thought you'd end up? "Yeah, more or less. I think after practice we looked pretty...slow. It's about where we thought we'd be. I think, to be honest, probably closer to that next pact behind Kimi and Lewis so yeah. A tricky day to be honest but we'll try and improve for tomorrow."
social:piasnews-social-a749b8efd05c6de7:.zh: 问：那就是你原本预期的最终排名吗？“嗯，差不多吧。我觉得在练习之后，我们的表现相当……缓慢。这大概就是我们应有的水平吧。说实话，我们可能更接近基米和刘易斯所在的那个排名位置。今天确实是个艰难的一天，不过我们会努力在明天有所进步。”

social:piasnews-social-00b519216b380d2a:.source_text: Q: is it harder to deal with last year knowing the car now isnt quite there for a title challenge? osc: no, the lessons from last year still apply to now. we're not fighting for a championship now but we're still fighting for the team. we believe we can still turn things around. https://t.co/OZjBeVebhB
social:piasnews-social-00b519216b380d2a:.zh: 问：既然知道今年的赛车在争夺冠军方面还有所不足，那么应对这种情况会不会更困难呢？ 奥斯克：不，去年的经验仍然适用。我们现在虽然不再争夺总冠军，但仍在为球队的利益而努力。我们相信自己仍然有能力扭转局面。 https://t.co/OZjBeVebhB

social:piasnews-social-d189785e7b68ff45:.source_text: oscar on silly season rumors: "i know i'm [in mcl] for the next while. the team are happy with me, i'm happy with the team. it's all noise and not for me to deal with. i'm trying to stay focused on performing the best i can. i'll let others have their fun and do their talking." https://t.co/0nkgPaY4Zf
social:piasnews-social-d189785e7b68ff45:.zh: 奥斯卡对那些无聊的传闻回应道：“我知道自己还会在 MCL 队待一段时间。球队对我很满意，我也很满意这支球队。那些都是无稽之谈，我没必要去理会。我只会专注于尽自己最大努力去表现。让别人去享受他们的乐趣、说他们的闲话吧。”https://t.co/0nkgPaY4Zf
